name: T2.5-prores-4k-plus-h264-1440p-hls
description: CRITICAL test. ProRes 4K + composited H.264 HLS at 1440p @ 10Mbps — Phase 2b minus the raw camera writer. Does removing the raw camera writer prevent failure mode 4? If this PASSES, task-4 Path C (drop the raw camera writer at 1440p+) becomes a viable fix. If this FAILS, the combination of ProRes 4K + 1440p HLS + CIContext is sufficient on its own to trigger the kernel wedge.
